### LinkedIn

Enabled: true

Data Structures and Algorithms (DSA) practice can feel overwhelming without a clear structure. CodeGrind addresses this by organizing problems into sequential learning paths that scaffold knowledge and build toward interview readiness. Our approach segments problems into Easy, Medium, and Hard tiers, focusing on foundational patterns, skill integration, and advanced mastery respectively. We also provide real-time progression tracking with a scoring system that rewards speed and efficiency. Discover how CodeGrind transforms scattered practice into measurable growth. #CodeGrind #DSA #DataStructures #Algorithms #CodingPractice #InterviewPrep https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/04/04/codegrind-learning-path-structure/
